query:
ALTER TABLE pool_retrospectives
  ADD COLUMN videoUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN videoKey VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN videoStatus ENUM('pending','processing','done','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';

ALTER TABLE retrospective_config
  ADD COLUMN enableSlides TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN enableVideo TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN videoQuality ENUM('low','medium','high') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium';

ALTER TABLE pool_retrospectives
  ADD COLUMN videoUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN videoKey VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN videoStatus ENUM('pending','processing','done','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';

ALTER TABLE retrospective_config
  ADD COLUMN enableSlides TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN enableVideo TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN videoQuality ENUM('low','medium','high') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium';
